properties.Test Case: When you move the cursor from one to another box, the TBT buttons (including the Advanced ones) should update to be correct for that box.
properties.Steps: -- When you move the cursor from one to another box, the TBT buttons (including the Advanced ones) should update to be correct for that box.

properties.Test Case: Re-record the same bit several times using different words. After each, press the "4) Check" button. Confirm that it plays back what you just recorded.
properties.Steps: Re-record the same bit several times using different words. After each, press the "4) Check" button. Confirm that it plays back what you just recorded.

properties.Test Case: Put your microphone next to your mouse, then do several recordings. Confirm that clicks are not getting into the recording. (JT, 6.3: if the mouse makes a significant click on mouse-up, it is getting recorded. I found the same thing in 6.2 and 4.4.6. Probably only worth counting as a failure if it seems to be getting worse.)
properties.Steps: Put your microphone next to your mouse, then do several recordings. Confirm that clicks are not getting into the recording. (JT, 6.3: if the mouse makes a significant click on mouse-up, it is getting recorded. I found the same thing in 6.2 and 4.4.6. Probably only worth counting as a failure if it seems to be getting worse.)

properties.Test Case: Confirm that the start and end of your vocalization is not getting cut off. (it's difficult for us to do this *and* not record mouse clicks, but that's the goal)
properties.Steps: Confirm that the start and end of your vocalization is not getting cut off. (it's difficult for us to do this *and* not record mouse clicks, but that's the goal)

properties.Test Case: Clear the recordings. Under "Advanced", set the Recording Mode to "By whole textbox". You should be able to switch back and forth, because there are no recordings.
properties.Steps: Clear the recordings. Under "Advanced", set the Recording Mode to "By whole textbox". You should be able to switch back and forth, because there are no recordings.
